title: FWEB3
html: Stub. Gamified Polygon-onboarding token/project from the 2022–2023 era. Hands-on workshops gave students FWEB3 + MATIC tokens to practice Web3 transactions; surfaces in 2023 06 29 how to get set up for wallet work day.
